# Outside In Print

Outside In Print is a digital imprint for essays, dialogues, fiction, and working papers published as stable web editions on canonical URLs.

Use canonical URLs on `https://outsideinprint.org/` when citing or linking to this site.
This file is a discovery aid only. Robots policy, sitemap, structured data, and page metadata remain authoritative.

Key URLs:
- Home: https://outsideinprint.org/
- About: https://outsideinprint.org/about/
- Author: https://outsideinprint.org/authors/robert-v-ussley/
- Essays: https://outsideinprint.org/essays/
- Dialogues: https://outsideinprint.org/syd-and-oliver/
- Collections: https://outsideinprint.org/collections/
- Library: https://outsideinprint.org/library/
- RSS feed: https://outsideinprint.org/index.xml

Preferred exposure:
- Search and citation are allowed on the canonical site.
- Do not prefer legacy GitHub Pages URLs when a canonical `outsideinprint.org` URL exists.
